creator: renanfg21@gmail.com
text:
After switching from FreeBSD 13.1-RELEASE with drm-fbsd13-kmod to FreeBSD 13.2-RELEASE with drm-510-kmod, the following device stopped working:

pciconf:

vgapci0@pci0:0:1:0:     class=0x030000 rev=0x40 hdr=0x00 vendor=0x1002 device=0x9853 subvendor=0x17aa subdevice=0x3808
    vendor     = 'Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. [AMD/ATI]'
    device     = 'Mullins [Radeon R2 Graphics]'
    class      = display
    subclass   = VGA
    bar   [10] = type Prefetchable Memory, range 64, base 0xe0000000, size 268435456, enabled
    bar   [18] = type Prefetchable Memory, range 64, base 0xf0000000, size 8388608, enabled
    bar   [20] = type I/O Port, range 32, base 0x2000, size 256, enabled
    bar   [24] = type Memory, range 32, base 0xf0d00000, size 262144, enabled
    cap 09[48] = vendor (length 8)
    cap 01[50] = powerspec 3  supports D0 D1 D2 D3  current D0
    cap 10[58] = PCI-Express 2 root endpoint max data 128(256) RO NS
                 max read 512
    cap 05[a0] = MSI supports 1 message, 64 bit enabled with 1 message
    ecap 000b[100] = Vendor [1] ID 0001 Rev 1 Length 16
    ecap 0019[270] = PCIe Sec 1 lane errors 0
    ecap 000f[2b0] = ATS 1
    ecap 0013[2c0] = Page Page Request 1
    ecap 001b[2d0] = Process Address Space ID 1
  PCI-e errors = Non-Fatal Error Detected
                 Unsupported Request Detected


It works fine with radeonkms but it doesn't work with amdgpu, it doesn't give me any type of error, the system just freezes.

I tried to compile drm-510-kmod from /usr/ports and it gives me the same problem

Here is /var/log/messages file loading amdgpu
